ol.li: Units: Fragment offsets are measured in 8-octet units ($Offset \times 8 = ByteIndex$).
Overlap: If fragments overlap, subsequent data typically overwrites existing data (vulnerability risk).
Atomic: Total reassembled size cannot exceed 65,535 bytes (IP limit).
Bitmap: RFC 815 optimization uses a linked list of holes instead of a full bitmask.

ul.li: ID Field: 1234 (must be persistent across fragments)
MF (More Fragments): Set to 1 for all but last
